title: Sign of the Times
why_this_song: Sign of the Times by Harry Styles (2017) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Just stop your crying, it's a sign of the times"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "Just stop your crying, it's a sign of the times"
Appears 7 times; first heard in: "If we never learn, we've been here before"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "stop" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "stop" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "crying" in the whole song?

excerpts.text: Hope you're wearing your best clothes
We gotta get away from here

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "Sign of the Times" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "Sign of the Times" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "Sign of the Times" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "Sign of the Times" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "Sign of the Times" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "Sign of the Times"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
